text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, it's time for the Tracen Meet, an internal event
designed to give students an opportunity to push their limits. This
time, the competition seems even more heated than usual.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's a runaway Maruzensky, with Symboli Rudolf on the chase! Will it
be a dead heat between these two? They're leaving the pack behind!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: How lucky are we to be seeing a show like this at school? Oh, they're on the final corner!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky & Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hahhh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
I-incredible! Simply incredible! Can the Emperor catch up? Will the
Hot Rod run away with it?! They're down to the last 100 meters in this
battle of the century!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Sakura Chiyono O leave the stands with a grimace on her face,
I find myself wanting to follow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: When I finally find her, she's absolutely soaked.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh! T-Trainer! I, um, I'm fine! I was just feeling a little bleh, so I splashed myself with some water!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yeah, or more like... meh? Or "hnghh"? You know, when your heart and head are all like whoo...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: That sort of... feeling...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Sorry. To be honest, there's nothing cutesy about how I feel.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The race was amazing. It felt every bit as exciting as a G1. The crowd
all held their breath, overwhelmed by the spectacle...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Watching a race like that, I... I felt like...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I could never stand shoulder to shoulder with them.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
S-something like that, anyway! Ahaha! Sorry, I'm not making any
sense!
choice_data_list: You don't know until you try.
You don't know until you try.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm... not sure about that.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Th-the thing is, ever since the day I was captivated by Maruzen, I
started doing everything I possibly could.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I-I felt like I was growing, and my times did actually improve. My form
even got compliments from my instructor...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't much, but I was getting closer—closer to her! I really
believed that, but...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: After all that hard work, all that improvement, I realized something!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...We're still worlds apart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She whips the letter from earlier out of her pocket and tears it to
shreds.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ah... S-sorry! I, um... I need to go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She picks up the shreds one by one and tosses them into the trash
can, then runs off before I can stop her.

text_block_list.name: Letter
text_block_list.text:
If I could one day run alongside you in front of thousands, it would be
a dream come true.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I catch a glimpse of her letter, written in large, neat, but shaky letters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Over the next few days, I can't stop worrying about Sakura Chiyono
O, but I struggle to figure out the best way to approach her.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You wanted to talk about Chiyo? What's this all about, Rudolf?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You must already be aware, but... ever since our scrimmage race, she's
been feeling down. Hishi Amazon alerted me to this.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I kept tabs on her for a few days, and it seemed her mind was
elsewhere. Her face looked sickly too.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Adulation and despair are two sides of the same coin. Many leave the
academy in tears over broken dreams... "I'll never catch up to you."
I've heard those words countless times.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: As have you, I imagine.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Heh. Ever the worrywart, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It's true that she might not be the most gifted. But she knows that.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's why she's out on the track every morning, monitoring her
condition, racking her brain over how she can improve.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
What I mean is, she stares her weaknesses in the eye every single day.
It takes a strong heart to do that... So she'll be just fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has a point. Coming to terms with your own weaknesses sounds
easy, but surprisingly few can do it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure some of that tenacity stems from Chiyono O's own
personality, but the biggest factor must be...

text_block_list.name: Letter
text_block_list.text:
If I could one day run alongside you in front of thousands, it would be
a dream come true.
choice_data_list: (She has Maruzensky to look up to.)

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
She's just not quite ready to take the dive and get hurt yet. Once she
is, she'll be on our heels in no time.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...I see. Forgive my ignorance, then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O might bend, but she won't break. With just a little
more courage, she'll be back on her feet running with a smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Before I know it, I'm dashing down the stairs and off looking for her.
